173.reason: [Same issue as with '&': a single '|' triggers error code 'a', but the line number recorded (lineNum) may not correspond to the actual line where the standalone '|' appears, because lineNum is only updated when '\n' is consumed during whitespace skipping, and the error is reported after possibly advancing past the character without proper line tracking.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [Same issue as with '&': a single '|' triggers error code 'a', but the line number recorded (lineNum) may not correspond to the actual line where the standalone '|' appears, because lineNum is only updated when '\n' is consumed during whitespace skipping, and the error is reported after possibly advancing past the character without proper line tracking.]
